title: Richard Pryor: Live on the Sunset Strip
original_title: Richard Pryor: Live on the Sunset Strip
overview: Richard Pryor's stand-up act includes his frank discussion about his freebasing addiction, as well as the infamous night on June 9, 1980 that he caught on fire.
